name: membrane-mcp-server
description: MCP server for the Membrane story engine

mcp.name: membrane-story-engine
mcp.description: Exposes Membrane's story engine — stories, chapters, characters, beats, worldbuilding, and AI generation — as MCP tools and resources.

tools.name: list_stories
tools.description: List all stories for the current user.

tools.name: get_story
tools.description: Get a full story with chapters, characters, beats, worldbuilding, and key events.

tools.name: create_story
tools.description: Create a new story. Auto-creates the first chapter.

tools.name: update_story
tools.description: Update a story's title or description.

tools.name: delete_story
tools.description: Delete a story and all its chapters, characters, and beats.

tools.name: create_chapter
tools.description: Add a new chapter to a story.

tools.name: update_chapter
tools.description: Update a chapter's title, text, or summary.

tools.name: summarize_chapter
tools.description: AI-summarize a chapter's prose.

tools.name: list_characters
tools.description: List all characters in a story.

tools.name: create_character
tools.description: Create a new character profile.

tools.name: update_character
tools.description: Update character fields.

tools.name: delete_character
tools.description: Delete a character.

tools.name: create_beat
tools.description: Add a story beat/scene to a chapter.

tools.name: get_beats
tools.description: List all beats in a chapter.

tools.name: update_beat
tools.description: Update a beat's description or order.

tools.name: delete_beat
tools.description: Delete a beat.

tools.name: create_world_element
tools.description: Add a worldbuilding element to a chapter.

tools.name: get_world_elements
tools.description: List worldbuilding elements in a chapter.

tools.name: create_key_event
tools.description: Add a key event/outline point to a chapter.

tools.name: get_key_events
tools.description: List key events in a chapter.

tools.name: add_memory
tools.description: Add a text memory to the vector store for a project.

tools.name: search_memory
tools.description: Semantic search across project memories.

tools.name: generate_character
tools.description: AI-generate a character profile.

tools.name: generate_worldbuilding
tools.description: AI-generate a worldbuilding element.

tools.name: generate_prose
tools.description: AI-generate narrative prose from chapter beats and context.

tools.name: query_context
tools.description: RAG-style context query — compile relevant story context for a question.

resources.name: Story
resources.description: Full story with chapters, characters, beats, and worldbuilding.

resources.name: Chapter
resources.description: Chapter with its text, summary, beats, worldbuilding, and key events.
